description: Verso (original use): Fatimid state report from a government official: "The deceased was an employee in the western caravan. He returned and lost his mind in the course of the year four-hundred and fifty-five and expired. He had not received anything of what was due to him...." (Information from Khan, ALAD, Doc. 112.)
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
